title: QDC CORE 4.0
description:
A mod to enhance vanilla minecraft.

This is the 4th version of the QDC - Quantum Dis-Assembly Craft mod. 

Includes other QDC Mods
body:
A mod to enhance vanilla minecraft experience.

This is the 4th version of the QDC - Quantum Dis-Assembly Craft mod.

Despite the name this is not a Core Mod, its the whole mod =)

# New Mod Reconstruction - [QDC CORE 4.5](https://modrinth.com/mod/qdc-core-4.5)


# New Official Mod Guide

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/xhgNZwxo6Oc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


Please report bugs and crashes to drgraveguard@qdccorewiki.com =)

# Core Sections

- Research Missions
  - Discover a collection of items for each mission, for rewards.


- Item Disassembly
  - Disassemble items to dicover the item, and get particles.

  
- Item Assembly
  - Assemble discovered vanilla items from particles.
  - Assemble Mod Items and Machines.


- Particle Conversion
  - Convert particles to a higher or lower tier.


- Quantum Revelation
  - Rewards for every 10 minutes of gameplay.
  - Rewards include an undiscovered item and particles.


- Corruption Recycler
  - Use corruption particles to discover undiscovered items.


- Quantum Elevator
  - Place platforms, that the player can teleport to from the GUI.
  - If the platforms are in the same x and z coordinates, they will be merged into an elevator in the GUI


## Old Forge Tutorial, there are some changes in NeoForge version.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/mNvojA3KjfE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Mod Progress


1. Phase One, Complete, which is the core of the mod.


2. Phase Two, Complete, this includes adding Pushy Pully Megy section to NeoForge version

3. Phase Three, Complete, this includes the following Qdc Machines being added to the NeoForge QDC CORE 4.0 Mod:
   
- Crop Planter
- Crop Harvester
- Tree Planter
- Tree Harvester
- Item Placer
- Item Extractor
- Quantum Quarry
- Mob Compressor
- Quantum Repairer
- Quantum Enchanter
- Quantum Potion Machine
- QuantumLight Machine

  Machine Demo Playlist: [https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLhB4HvwYUuayyKlwNeUFP9QWUxBQCrL6L](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLhB4HvwYUuayyKlwNeUFP9QWUxBQCrL6L)

4.Phase Four, Complete, this includes the addition of Quantum Tool, a tool that changes according to the block ur harvesting.

5.Phase Five, Complete, this includes the addition of Quantum Elevator, a player transport network.


# Next Step
- Test 1.21.8 version (COMPLETE)
- Calibrate 1.21.8 version (COMPLETE)
- Port Mod to ealier version of Minecraft 1.21 (COMPLETE)
- Port Mod to versions of Minecraft released after 1.21.8 (IN PROGRESS)
